subcodes.title: Words to Kinney, Beede, Thompson party, spoken on 1909-07-04
subcodes.first_line: Yes, it is a good day in America, the day of your physical freedom. But today you celebrated your spiritual freedom…. The world is in prison and bondage, through the heads of religion who have captivated the spirit.
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @true liberty; freedom, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @blind imitation [taqlid], @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas
